en: Thus says the LORD: "For three transgressions of Moab, and for four, I will not revoke the punishment, because he burned to lime the bones of the king of Edom.
zh: “耶和華這樣說： ‘摩押三番四次犯罪， 我必不收回懲罰他的命令； 因為他把以東王的骸骨焚燒成灰。

en: So I will send a fire upon Moab, and it shall devour the strongholds of Kerioth, and Moab shall die amid uproar, amid shouting and the sound of the trumpet;
zh: 我必降火在摩押， 燒毀加略的堡壘； 在擾攘、吶喊、吹角聲中， 摩押必被消滅。

en: I will cut off the ruler from its midst, and will kill all its princes with him," says the LORD.
zh: 我必剪除他的掌權者， 也把他所有的領袖一同殺死。’ 這是耶和華說的。

en: Thus says the LORD: "For three transgressions of Judah, and for four, I will not revoke the punishment, because they have rejected the law of the LORD, and have not kept his statutes, but their lies have led them astray, those after which their fathers walked.
zh: “耶和華這樣說： ‘猶大三番四次犯罪， 我必不收回懲罰他的命令； 因為他棄絕耶和華的律法， 不遵守他的典章； 反被他們列祖跟從的偶像， 使他們走錯了路。

en: So I will send a fire upon Judah, and it shall devour the strongholds of Jerusalem."
zh: 我必降火在猶大， 燒毀耶路撒冷的堡壘。’

en: Thus says the LORD: "For three transgressions of Israel, and for four, I will not revoke the punishment, because they sell the righteous for silver, and the needy for a pair of sandals-
zh: “耶和華這樣說： ‘以色列三番四次犯罪， 我必不收回懲罰他的命令； 因為他為了銀子賣義人， 為了一雙鞋賣窮人。

en: those who trample the head of the poor into the dust of the earth and turn aside the way of the afflicted; a man and his father go in to the same girl, so that my holy name is profaned;
zh: 他們踐踏窮人的頭， 好像踐踏地面的塵土； 他們把困苦人應有的權益奪去； 兒子和父親與同一個女子親近， 故意褻瀆我的聖名。

en: they lay themselves down beside every altar on garments taken in pledge, and in the house of their God they drink the wine of those who have been fined.
zh: 他們在各祭壇旁， 躺臥在別人抵押的衣服上面； 在他們 神的殿中， 飲用拿剝削回來的錢所買的酒。

en: "Yet it was I who destroyed the Amorite before them, whose height was like the height of the cedars and who was as strong as the oaks; I destroyed his fruit above and his roots beneath.
zh: 我不是在他們面前把亞摩利人消滅了嗎？ 亞摩利人雖像香柏樹高大， 像橡樹那樣堅固； 我卻要滅絕它樹上的果子， 拔除樹下的根。

en: Also it was I who brought you up out of the land of Egypt and led you forty years in the wilderness, to possess the land of the Amorite.
zh: 我不是帶你們出埃及地， 領你們在曠野度過四十年， 叫你們得著亞摩利人的地為業嗎？

en: And I raised up some of your sons for prophets, and some of your young men for Nazirites. Is it not indeed so, O people of Israel?" declares the LORD.
zh: 我從你們子孫中興起先知， 從年輕人中興起拿細耳人； 以色列人哪！這不是事實嗎？’ 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "But you made the Nazirites drink wine, and commanded the prophets, saying, 'You shall not prophesy.'
zh: ‘但你們迫使拿細耳人喝酒， 吩咐先知說：不要說預言。

en: "Behold, I will press you down in your place, as a cart full of sheaves presses down.
zh: 看哪！我要使你腳下的地搖蕩， 好像滿載禾捆的車子搖蕩一樣。

en: Flight shall perish from the swift, and the strong shall not retain his strength, nor shall the mighty save his life;
zh: 行動迅速的不能逃走， 強而有力的不能施展他的勇力， 勇士也不能救自己；

en: he who handles the bow shall not stand, and he who is swift of foot shall not save himself, nor shall he who rides the horse save his life;
zh: 拿弓的人站立不住， 跑得快的不能逃走， 騎馬的也不能救自己。

en: and he who is stout of heart among the mighty shall flee away naked in that day," declares the LORD.
zh: 到那日，最勇敢的戰士， 也是赤身逃跑。’ 這是耶和華的宣告。”
